steps.title: Set up earnings for each work segment
steps.content:
Megan's total earnings come from two segments:
  • First 8 hours at regular rate: $8p$
  • Remaining $10 - 8 = 2$ hours at overtime rate: $2(1.5p) = 3p$

steps.title: Solve for the regular hourly wage
steps.content:
Total earnings equal the sum of both segments: $$8p + 3p = 137.50$$
Combine like terms: $$11p = 137.50$$
Divide by 11: $$p = \frac{137.50}{11} = 12.50$$
Megan's regular hourly wage is \$12.50. B is correct.
